concerns.text: Task T034 ('exclude spectra where water feature is indistinguishable from noise') has no matching spec requirement. Spec FR-002 and Edge Cases explicitly MANDATE deriving an upper limit (censored value) for such data, NOT excluding it. This task contradicts the spec and lacks a valid requirement anchor.

Task T028 (Ridge regression fallback) lacks a direct spec anchor. While Plan 'Complexity Tracking' mentions a fallback for VIF > 5, Spec FR-005 requires 'Tobit regression (or equivalent censored-data model)'. Ridge regression on censored data is not a standard equivalent. The task implements a method not explicitly authorized by the spec's functional requirements.

Task T035 (generate quality report on 'quantity of observational data') lacks a specific spec requirement anchor. Spec FR-001 mandates downloading ALL available spectra. SC-004 requires measuring statistical power, but T035 describes a report on data quantity rather than a task to calculate/verify the power threshold (0.8) defined in SC-004.

Task T031 (record spectral resolution and SNR in metadata) lacks a direct spec requirement anchor. Spec FR-001 only requires extracting temperature and metallicity. While helpful for reviewer response, there is no FR/SC mandating the storage or use of resolution/SNR in the primary data model or analysis pipeline.

Success Criterion SC-003 (robustness measured by CI width of water mixing ratio distribution ≤ 0.2 dex) has no corresponding task. The tasks focus on calculating the CI for the correlation coefficient (Kendall's tau) in T026, but no task exists to measure the stability of the water mixing ratio distribution itself as defined in SC-003.
